HGSS.002.0001:
This Pokémon hides on the
seafloor and watches the
shore with eyes on its back.
HGSS.002.0002:
This Pokémon knew no fear
and flew as it pleased
through the skies long ago.
HGSS.002.0003:
A ten-legged Pokémon that
swims on the bottom of the
sea and eats plankton.
HGSS.002.0004:
This Pokémon, with feathers
of seven colors, flies through
the sky, according to legend.
HGSS.002.0005: Are you sure you would like to quit?
